violations.text: At the time of inspection, the following equipment located in the kitchen area was observed to be not in good repair/in need of adjustment... - A rice cooker pot handle was observed to be missing the retaining nut to the pot handle. Rice cooker pot was taken out of service for further use until serviced/repaired. PIC is to ensure equipment is inspected for loose parts and taken out of service as needed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/27/2025

The presence of small flying insects (Drain Flies) is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects observed in the bathroom, kitchen, and storage areas. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. (At the time of inspection, the PIC stated pest control will be called to be made aware of flying insect activity and to request for special/more frequent visit/inspection.) New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
